runParameters.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Kernel matches Dawn GenWorkgroupWithAtomics (256 threads, 1 atomicStore + 256 atomicLoads per invocation). Both sides dispatch 100 times per step with direct timing (no side-specific divisor scaling).
workload.description: Workgroup-atomic compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf exactly.
workload.name: workgroup-atomic 1024
